paragraphs: kioku ("we" or "us") takes your privacy extremely seriously. This Privacy Policy describes what information we collect, and how we use and protect it, in connection with our AI-powered learning platform (the "Service").

collected.title: 1. Information We Collect
collected.lead: To deliver the Service effectively, we collect the following information.

items.desc: Name, email address, affiliated institution, and other information provided when you create an account.
Learning materials such as PDFs, documents, and images that you intentionally upload for AI-based analysis or summarization.
Logs of questions, prompts, and generated responses involving the AI assistant (used to maintain learning context).
Technical information such as access logs, device information, and IP addresses, used to monitor system performance and maintain security.

aiCommitment.title: 2. Our Commitments on AI Models and Data Use
aiCommitment.lead: We recognize that, given the educational nature of the Service, materials you upload may contain highly sensitive information. We strictly adhere to the following principles.

cards.title: Not used to train foundation models
cards.body: Personal learning materials, notes, and PDFs uploaded by users are not used as training data for kioku's overall AI foundation models.

cards.title: Tenant isolation
cards.body: Your data is logically isolated, and another customer's AI will never generate responses based on the contents of your documents.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing and Third Parties
sharing.lead: We do not share, sell, or rent your personal information or uploaded data to third parties, except in the following cases.
items: When you have given explicit consent.

When it is necessary to use external infrastructure providers (such as cloud hosting or specific AI API providers) that are essential to delivering the Service. We enter into strict data processing agreements with these providers and prohibit any use of data outside the agreed purposes.
When disclosure is required by law.

retention.title: 4. Data Retention and Deletion
paragraphs: We retain your data only while your account remains active or as long as necessary to provide the Service. You may request complete deletion of your data and your account at any time from the account settings screen. Once we receive a deletion request, your data — including backups — will be securely erased from our systems.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.lead: You have the following rights with respect to your data.

cards.title: Data export
cards.body: You can download your saved notes and conversation history in a standard format.

cards.title: Complete deletion
cards.body: The right to immediately delete specific uploaded files or your entire account.

contact.title: 6. Contact Us
contact.lead: For any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data handling practices, or to exercise your rights, please contact us at the address below.
